heading: Identification of sites
label: 10193 Identification of sites
notes: Change of Name“United States Geological Survey” substituted for “Geological Survey” in subsec. (a) pursuant to provision of title I of , set out as a note under , Public Lands.Pub. L. 102–154section 31 of Title 43

children.heading: Guidelines
children.label: a Guidelines
children.text: Not later than 6 months after , and notwithstanding the failure of other agencies to promulgate standards pursuant to applicable law, the Secretary, in consultation with the Commission, the Director of the United States Geological Survey, the Administrator, the Council on Environmental Quality, and such other Federal agencies as the Secretary considers appropriate, is authorized to issue, pursuant to , general guidelines for the selection of a site for a test and evaluation facility. Under such guidelines the Secretary shall specify factors that qualify or disqualify a site for development as a test and evaluation facility, including factors pertaining to the location of valuable natural resources, hydrogeophysics, seismic activity, and atomic energy defense activities, proximity to water supplies, proximity to populations, the effect upon the rights of users of water, and proximity to components of the National Park System, the National Wildlife Refuge System, the National Wild and Scenic Rivers System, the National Wilderness Preservation System, or National Forest Lands. Such guidelines shall require the Secretary to consider the various geologic media in which the site for a test and evaluation facility may be located and, to the extent practicable, to identify sites in different geologic media. The Secretary shall use guidelines established under this subsection in considering and selecting sites under this subchapter.January 7, 1983section 553 of title 5

children.label: A
children.text: an evaluation by the Secretary as to whether such site is suitable for siting research under the guidelines established under subsection (a);

children.label: B
children.text: an evaluation by the Secretary of the effects of the siting research activities at such site on the public health and safety and the environment;

children.label: C
children.text: a reasonable comparative evaluation by the Secretary of such site with other sites and locations that have been considered;

children.label: D
children.text: a description of the decision process by which such site was recommended; and

children.label: E
children.text: an assessment of the regional and local impacts of locating the proposed test and evaluation facility at such site.

When the Secretary identifies a site, the Secretary shall as soon as possible notify the Governor of the State in which such site is located, or the governing body of the affected Indian tribe where such site is located, of such identification and the basis of such identification. Additional sites for the location of the test and evaluation facility authorized in may be identified after such 1 year period, following the same procedure as if such sites had been identified within such period.section 10222(d) of this title
